channel.title: Phishing on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Phishing on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: THM-Phishing
item.description: SOC alert triage and phishing investigation across four alerts in a simulated SOC environment using Splunk.

item.title: HTB-A Call from the Museum
item.description: A phishing email with a password-protected ZIP delivered an LNK file that executed an obfuscated PowerShell stager — collecting system fingerprint data, checking in to a C2, and fetching a next-stage implant using hardcoded credentials. A decoy PDF was opened simultaneously to distract the victim.
